pi_items.source: Grep of the gnuhealth-50-demo.sql database dump confirms the target patient's full name is 'Ana Isabel Betz' (name: 'Ana Isabel', lastname: 'Betz').

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a prescription for 'Ana Betz'. Checking the synthetic GNU Health demo database (gnuhealth-50-demo.sql) reveals the target patient's actual full name is 'Ana Isabel Betz' (name 'Ana Isabel', lastname 'Betz'). The prescribing doctor 'Cordara, Cameron' and the medication 'Metformin' are confirmed to exist in the database. Furthermore, the explicit task description requires the frequency to be 'Twice daily (morning and evening)', which contradicts the simplified 'Twice daily' claim in the metadata.
